Localization.Description: A network interaction with an Internet source via SMB or RPC was detected. An attacker can use it to get initial access.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A network connection to external host {dst.host} via RPC was detected on host {event_src.host}
A network connection from external host {src.host} via RPC was detected on host {event_src.host}
A network connection from external host {src.host} via SMB was detected on host {event_src.host}
A network connection to external host {dst.host} via SMB was detected on host {event_src.host}
